node.text: Joanna is open to giving movie recommendations and discussing movies.

node.text: Joanna enjoys the movie 'Little Women' and recommends it as a great story about sisterhood, love, and reaching for dreams.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "watch recommend Nate February 7 2022") on Session 3 (Score: 0.95)

node.text: Joanna submitted a screenplay to a film festival and is hoping a producer or director falls in love with it to get it on the big screen.

node.text: Joanna seems curious about trying dairy-free desserts and flavors after Nate mentions making coconut milk ice cream.

node.text: Joanna appreciates Nate's support for her screenplay and mentions that it means a lot to her.

node.text: Joanna's new screenplay is about a thirty-year-old woman on a journey of self-discovery after a loss, inspired by personal experiences.
Joanna is keen to try Nate's dairy-free dessert recipe.
Joanna hopes her screenplay gets noticed and makes it to the screen.
Joanna is a writer and has written a screenplay.
Joanna has started writing another screenplay focused on self-discovery after a loss, inspired by personal experiences.
